title: arctostaphylos alpina
intro: Arctostaphylos alpina, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of arbutin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of bearberry include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health. Bearberry can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusible extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
